app.title: LLM Tycoon
app.subtitle: Staff up your autonomous engineering studio

newProjectWizard.empty: No recommendations yet. Add a project description above.

describe.label: Project description
describe.placeholder: e.g., Payment module hardening — PCI audit + token encryption
describe.hint: Describe scope and goals. Recommendations update as you type.

errors.DEPENDENCY_MISSING: A required adapter dependency is missing.

locale.title: Choose your language
locale.body: You can switch anytime from the settings. The interface and Claude recommendations follow your choice.

mcp.title: Pick an MCP transport
mcp.body: Use stdio for local tools and streamable HTTP for remote services. You can change it per project later.

recommend.title: Get a team recommended
recommend.body: Describe your project — Claude suggests a starter team. Here's a preview:
recommend.demoDescription: Payment module hardening — PCI audit + token encryption

tokens.title: Watch your token budget
tokens.body: The top indicator shows input, output, and cache-hit tokens. Auto-compaction toasts keep you informed.
